question: Apa saja field penting dalam PodSpec?

ground_truth.answer: PodSpec mendefinisikan containers (wajib), volumes, initContainers, restartPolicy, serviceAccountName, dan tolerations. Field containers adalah satu-satunya field yang wajib ada.
context: io.k8s.api.core.v1.PodSpec: PodSpec is the specification of the desired behavior of the pod.
containers: List of containers belonging to the pod. Required.
